---
applyTo: "**"
description: "Requirements for creating an ft-tracker functionality"
---

## Overview
Create a HTML file for tracking ft throughout the month. The name of the generated file should be ft-tracker-v2.html

The tracker should show a monthyl calendar view with the ft prices for each day populated with the respective cells

The default value of 50 Rupees should be populated across all days. User should have an option to modify or delete the price for a particular day.
